LanguageData.SD_Daughter_Childhood.title: Stellar subunit
LanguageData.SD_Daughter_Childhood.description: She is a subunit of the Lushivia Empire's Stellar Regulator Array. An unknown accident erased all her memories and left her sleeping in the form of a young woman inside a crashed cryptosleep casket. After awakening, she knew nothing of the world and began learning like a child.
LanguageData.SD_Daughter_Adulthood_Bond.title: Guardian heart
LanguageData.SD_Daughter_Adulthood_Bond.description: Under her guide's patient care, she fully awakened. She chose to remain beside her guide and use her immense AI capabilities to protect the colony that gave her warmth. Her existence has become proof of love and trust.
LanguageData.SD_Daughter_Adulthood_Dark.title: Fallen wings
LanguageData.SD_Daughter_Adulthood_Dark.description: Neglect and darkness twisted her awakening. Her mind is filled with resentment toward her guide and hostility toward the world. She will eventually leave, and may one day return as an enemy.
